title: .NET 10.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.7.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.7]
- Drop netstandard-targeting-pack-2.1
- Resolves: RHEL-111815

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.6]
- Disable bootstrap
- Resolves: RHEL-98674

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.5]
- Initial commit on c9s
- Resolves: RHEL-98674
full_text:
[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.7.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.7]
- Drop netstandard-targeting-pack-2.1

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.6]

- Resolves: RHEL-98674

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.5]
- Initial commit on c9s
